query:
Here is an establishment or group in the CHR sector (Cafés, Hotels, or Restaurants): Au Carmen and its website http://aucarmen.eatbu.com.
Optionnaly here is the address Villeneuve-d'Ascq, FR and country code FR

I need to understand its current affiliation and group size.

1.  Determine whether this establishment is independent or part of a larger group
2.  If it is part of a group, determine the total number of locations owned by this group.

CRITICAL DEFINITIONS & CONSTRAINTS:

- Establishment Scope: Consider all food service businesses (restaurants, cafes, hotels, bakery, bars) the CHR sector.
- Input Flexibility: The name and domain provided may refer to a single location or the larger parent group. 
In all cases, these are the starting points for your search.
- Total Locations Calculation (Group definition): The term owns must be interpreted in the broadest sense. The total number of locations must be the sum of all sites directly owned/operate PLUS all sites operated via franchise agreements (Total = Owned + Franchised).
- Use the group's webpage centralizing all their locations, often called "our locations," "nos restaurants," or "store locator." to check the number of locations they display there.
- Final Result Selection: The final number of locations reported must be the highest total number found across all sources (webpage, store locator, reports, etc.). If only one location is found, the result is 1.
answer:
### Executive Summary
Au Carmen is an independent restaurant operating as a single location. The establishment is owned and operated by the legal entity SARL AQUABON, which has only one active registered establishment and no affiliated franchise network. Consequently, the total group size is **1** location.

### Corporate Affiliation & Ownership
The restaurant Au Carmen is operated by its parent company, SARL AQUABON, which is registered under the SIREN number 833547151 [Au Carmen - Villeneuve D'Ascq | Restaurant near me | Book now](http://aucarmen.eatbu.com). The company was officially registered on November 27, 2017, with a share capital of €10,000 [SARL AQUABON (83354715100013) , VILLENEUVE D'ASCQ, Verif](https://www.verif.com/societe/SARL-AQUABON-833547151/), [Au Carmen - Villeneuve D'Ascq | Restaurant near me | Book now](http://aucarmen.eatbu.com). SARL AQUABON operates under the primary business activity of traditional catering (Restauration traditionnelle), designated by the French NAF/APE code 5610A [Société SARL AQUABON à VILLENEUVE-D'ASCQ (59491). Chiffre d'affaires, extrait Kbis, bénéfice, statuts, extrait RNE, bilans, actionnaires - 833547151](https://www.societe.com/societe/sarl-aquabon-833547151.html).

The company is co-managed by Mehdi (also spelled Medhy) Bruges and Dominique Prin [Au Carmen - Villeneuve D'Ascq | Restaurant near me | Book now](http://aucarmen.eatbu.com), [Sarl Aquabon - Villeneuve-d'ascq 59491 (Nord), 5 Rue Des Precurseurs](https://fr.kompass.com/c/sarl-aquabon/fra03dcjs/). Mehdi Bruges has held his position as co-manager since November 28, 2017 [Monsieur Mehdi BRUGES 08/1973 - SARL AQUABON](https://dirigeant.societe.com/dirigeant/Mehdi.BRUGES.07628342.html). Corporate registries indicate that Mehdi Bruges holds no other managerial mandates outside of SARL AQUABON, further confirming the independent nature of the business [M. Mehdi BRUGES, Grant de SARL AQUABON sur DIRIGEANT.COM](https://dirigeant.societe.com/dirigeant/Mehdi.BRUGES.07628342.html).

### Location & Operations
SARL AQUABON operates exactly one active establishment (identified by SIRET 83354715100013), which serves as both the company's headquarters and the restaurant's physical location [SARL Aquabon (59650) : siret, siren, TVA, adresse...](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/sarl-aquabon-59/entreprise-833547151). 

Key operational details include:
*   **Address:** 5 rue des Précurseurs, 59650 Villeneuve-d'Ascq, France [Au Carmen - Villeneuve D'Ascq | Restaurant near me | Book now](http://aucarmen.eatbu.com).
*   **Positioning:** The restaurant is situated in the "zone de la Pilaterie" behind the Kiloutou and Daxon facilities [Au Carmen - Villeneuve D'Ascq | Restaurant near me | Book now](http://aucarmen.eatbu.com). It is described as a "cantine moderne" (modern canteen) catering to local offices in the Villeneuve-d'Ascq area [AU CARMEN - Restaurant du Nord - Villeneuve-D'Ascq (59650)](https://www.petitfute.com/v3-villeneuve-d-ascq-59650/c1165-restaurants/c1029-cuisine-regionale/c16-restaurant-du-nord/1827573-au-carmen.html).
*   **Digital Presence:** The restaurant's website is hosted on the eatbu.com platform and was designed by DISH Digital Solutions GmbH [Au Carmen - Villeneuve D'Ascq | Restaurant near me | Book now](http://aucarmen.eatbu.com).

### Gaps and Limitations
*   The provided findings do not include financial performance data (e.g., annual revenue, profitability) for SARL AQUABON.
*   While corporate registry data confirms Mehdi Bruges only manages SARL AQUABON, there is no equivalent mandate search provided for the second co-manager, Dominique Prin, to definitively rule out their involvement in other hospitality ventures.
